form.formComment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 525m at Taree Super Track by 3.5 lengths in a Grade 4/5. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won his last two including a strong win last start over 525m at Taree Super Track by 3.5 lengths in a Grade 4/5. Top chance to chalk-up the hat-trick.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 6 lengths at Taree Super Track over 525m (30.28) beating Kiarni Bad Girl in Grade 5 on April 8. Has clocked a fast 29.84 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 6 lengths at Taree Super Track over 525m (30.28) beating Kiarni Bad Girl in Grade 5 on April 8. Has clocked a fast 29.84 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Taree Super Track (30.80) in a Grade 5, finishing a 7 length third. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In the money last time at Taree Super Track (30.80) in a Grade 5, finishing a 7 length third. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room on the turn on to the back straight and was checked.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (31.23) over 525m at Taree Super Track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when third (31.23) over 525m at Taree Super Track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Carried wide ounding the turn out of the front straight and was galloped on.
Soon after straightening appeared to alter gait momentarily and came together.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (31.07) over 525m at Taree Super Track. Tricky draw to overcome. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (31.07) over 525m at Taree Super Track. Tricky draw to overcome. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (31.23) at Taree Super Track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 12 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three places from five starts. Will need some luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (31.23) at Taree Super Track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 12 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three places from five starts. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when second (30.73) over 525m at Taree Super Track. Wide draw here. Has ability and should run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when second (30.73) over 525m at Taree Super Track. Wide draw here. Has ability and should run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted wide rounding the turn into the front straight.

form.formComment: Recent form has been ordinary and she is facing a tougher line up. Needs to do more. Others better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Recent form has been ordinary and she is facing a tougher line up. Needs to do more. Others better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked in onto the rail on two occasions when entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 300m at Taree Super Track behind Squid Worth beaten 9 lengths (18.20). This appears within her reach.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 11 over 300m at Taree Super Track behind Squid Worth beaten 9 lengths (18.20). This appears within her reach.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh on April 11 over 515m at The Gardens behind Modest Man, beaten 9 lengths (30.41) in a Grade 4/5. Holds top-three claims.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished seventh on April 11 over 515m at The Gardens behind Modest Man, beaten 9 lengths (30.41) in a Grade 4/5. Holds top-three claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Completed the event with a dislodged muzzle.
Bumped repeatedly along the home straight.
